info.name: Lab 05: Ollama Local LLM API
info.description:
Collection for testing the Lab 05 Ollama Local LLM API service.

Prerequisite: Ollama must be running with phi3.5 or tinyllama pulled.

Quick start:
  ollama pull phi3.5
  uv run --package ollama-local-llm-api uvicorn ollama_local_llm_api.app:app --reload
  # or
  docker compose -f labs/05-ollama-local-llm-api/docker-compose.yml up -d

request.description: Returns service liveness. Does not require Ollama. Expects 200 with status: "ok".
Summarize text using the default phi3.5 model. Requires Ollama running with phi3.5 pulled. Expects summary, model, and latency_ms.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Summarize using tinyllama with a short max_tokens budget. Faster than phi3.5 on CPU.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Empty text violates min_length=1. Expects 422 Unprocessable Entity before Ollama is called.
